subject: [PATCH v6 19/22] swap: simplify swapoff using virtual swap

2026-05-05.patch_summary: This patch simplifies and optimizes the swapoff process by utilizing virtual swap slots stored at page table entries. It eliminates the need for a page table walk, instead iterating through allocated swap slots on the swapfile to fault in corresponding virtual swap slots. This approach is cleaner and slightly more performant, reducing kernel CPU time by about 13% compared to the original code. The patch modifies several files, including mm/swapfile.c, which has undergone significant changes to implement this new design.
